steps.title: Find the median position
steps.content: The data is already ordered: 3, 3, 3, 5, 6, 6, 16. With 7 values (odd), the median is the middle value at position $$\frac{7+1}{2} = 4$$.

steps.title: Identify the middle value
steps.content:
Counting to position 4 in the ordered list:
Position 1: 3
Position 2: 3
Position 3: 3
Position 4: 5
The median is 5. That matches the correct answer - B is correct.
